channel.title: Toshiba Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Toshiba Corporation (toshiba).

item.title: CVE-2024-3498 · 7.8 HIGH — Incorrect Permission Assignment Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
item.description: Attackers can then execute malicious files by enabling certain services of the printer via the web configuration page and elevate its privileges to root. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-3497 · 8.8 HIGH — Directory Traversal Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Path traversal vulnerability in the web server of the Toshiba printer enables attacker to overwrite orginal files or add new ones to the printer. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-3496 · 8.8 HIGH — Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Attackers can bypass the web login authentication process to gain access to the printer's system information and upload malicious drivers to the printer. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27180 · 6.7 MEDIUM — TOCTOU vulnerability
item.description: An attacker with admin access can install rogue applications. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27179 · 4.7 MEDIUM — Session disclosure inside the log files
item.description: Admin cookies are written in clear-text in logs. An attacker can retrieve them and bypass the authentication mechanism. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27178 · 7.2 HIGH — Remote Code Execution
item.description: An attacker can get Remote Code Execution by overwriting files. Overwriting files is enable by falsifying file name variable. This vulnerability can be executed in combination with other vulnerabilities and difficult to execute alone. So, the CVSS sc…

item.title: CVE-2024-27177 · 7.2 HIGH — Remote Code Execution
item.description: An attacker can get Remote Code Execution by overwriting files. Overwriting files is enable by falsifying package name variable. This vulnerability can be executed in combination with other vulnerabilities and difficult to execute alone. So, the CVSS…

item.title: CVE-2024-27176 · 7.2 HIGH — Remote Code Execution
item.description: An attacker can get Remote Code Execution by overwriting files. Overwriting files is enable by falsifying session ID variable. This vulnerability can be executed in combination with other vulnerabilities and difficult to execute alone. So, the CVSS s…

item.title: CVE-2024-27175 · 4.4 MEDIUM — Local File Inclusion
item.description: Remote Command program allows an attacker to read any file using a Local File Inclusion vulnerability. An attacker can read any file on the printer. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27174 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — insecure upload
item.description: Remote Command program allows an attacker to get Remote Code Execution. This vulnerability can be executed in combination with other vulnerabilities and difficult to execute alone. So, the CVSS score for this vulnerability alone is lower than the sco…

item.title: CVE-2024-27173 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — insecure upload
item.description: Remote Command program allows an attacker to get Remote Code Execution by overwriting existing Python files containing executable code. This vulnerability can be executed in combination with other vulnerabilities and difficult to execute alone. So, t…

item.title: CVE-2024-27172 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Remote Code Execution
item.description: Remote Command program allows an attacker to get Remote Code Execution. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27171 · 7.4 HIGH — Insecure permissions
item.description: A remote attacker using the insecure upload functionality will be able to overwrite any Python file and get Remote Code Execution. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27170 · 7.4 HIGH — Hardcoded credentials for WebDAV access
item.description: It was observed that all the Toshiba printers contain credentials used for WebDAV access in the readable file. Then, it is possible to get a full access with WebDAV to the printer. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27169 · 8.4 HIGH — Lack of authentication
item.description: Toshiba printers provides API without authentication for internal access. A local attacker can bypass authentication in applications, providing administrative access. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27168 · 7.1 HIGH — Hardcoded keys used to generate authentication cookies
item.description: It appears that some hardcoded keys are used for authentication to internal API. Knowing these private keys may allow attackers to bypass authentication and reach administrative interfaces. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the refere…

item.title: CVE-2024-27167 · 7.4 HIGH — Insecure permissions
item.description: Toshiba printers use Sendmail to send emails to recipients. Sendmail is used with several insecure directories. A local attacker can inject a malicious Sendmail configuration file. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27166 · 7.4 HIGH — Insecure permissions
item.description: Coredump binaries in Toshiba printers have incorrect permissions. A local attacker can steal confidential information. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27165 · 7.8 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation
item.description: Toshiba printers contain a suidperl binary and it has a Local Privilege Escalation vulnerability. A local attacker can get root privileges. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27164 · 7.1 HIGH — Hardcoded credentials
item.description: Toshiba printers contain hardcoded credentials. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27163 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Leak of admin password and passwords
item.description: Toshiba printers will display the password of the admin user in clear-text and additional passwords when sending 2 specific HTTP requests to the internal API. An attacker stealing the cookie of an admin or abusing a XSS vulnerability can recover this…

item.title: CVE-2024-27162 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — DOM-based XSS
item.description: Toshiba printers provide a web interface that will load the JavaScript file. The file contains insecure codes vulnerable to XSS and is loaded inside all the webpages provided by the printer. An attacker can steal the cookie of an admin user. As for t…

item.title: CVE-2024-27161 · 6.2 MEDIUM — Hardcoded password used to encrypt files
item.description: all the Toshiba printers have programs containing a hardcoded key used to encrypt files. An attacker can decrypt the encrypted files using the hardcoded key. Insecure algorithm is used for the encryption. This vulnerability can be executed in combina…

item.title: CVE-2024-27160 · 6.2 MEDIUM — Hardcoded password used to encrypt logs and use of weak cipher
item.description: All the Toshiba printers contain a shell script using the same hardcoded key to encrypt logs. An attacker can decrypt the encrypted files using the hardcoded key. This vulnerability can be executed in combination with other vulnerabilities and diffic…

item.title: CVE-2024-27159 · 6.2 MEDIUM — Hardcoded password used to encrypt logs
item.description: All the Toshiba printers contain a shell script using the same hardcoded key to encrypt logs. An attacker can decrypt the encrypted files using the hardcoded key. This vulnerability can be executed in combination with other vulnerabilities and diffic…

item.title: CVE-2024-27158 · 7.4 HIGH — Hardcoded root password
item.description: All the Toshiba printers share the same hardcoded root password. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27157 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Leak of authentication sessions in secure logs
item.description: The sessions are stored in clear-text logs. An attacker can retrieve authentication sessions. A remote attacker can retrieve the credentials and bypass the authentication mechanism. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27156 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Leak of authentication sessions in secure logs
item.description: The session cookies, used for authentication, are stored in clear-text logs. An attacker can retrieve authentication sessions. A remote attacker can retrieve the credentials and bypass the authentication mechanism. As for the affected products/models…

item.title: CVE-2024-27155 · 7.7 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation and Remote Code Execution using insecure permissions
item.description: The Toshiba printers are vulnerable to a Local Privilege Escalation vulnerability. An attacker can remotely compromise any Toshiba printer. The programs can be replaced by malicious programs by any local or remote attacker. As for the affected produc…

item.title: CVE-2024-27154 · 6.2 MEDIUM — Passwords are stored in clear-text logs.
item.description: Passwords are stored in clear-text logs. An attacker can retrieve passwords. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27153 · 7.4 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation and Remote Code Execution
item.description: The Toshiba printers are vulnerable to a Local Privilege Escalation vulnerability. An attacker can remotely compromise any Toshiba printer. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27152 · 7.4 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation and Remote Code Execution using insecure permissions
item.description: The Toshiba printers are vulnerable to a Local Privilege Escalation vulnerability. An attacker can remotely compromise any Toshiba printer. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27151 · 7.4 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation and Remote Code Execution using insecure permissions
item.description: The Toshiba printers are vulnerable to a Local Privilege Escalation vulnerability. An attacker can remotely compromise any Toshiba printer. The programs can be replaced by malicious programs by any local or remote attacker. As for the affected produc…

item.title: CVE-2024-27150 · 7.4 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation and Remote Code Execution using insecure LD_LIBRARY_PATH
item.description: The Toshiba printers are vulnerable to a Local Privilege Escalation vulnerability. An attacker can remotely compromise any Toshiba printer. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27149 · 7.4 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation and Remote Code Execution using insecure LD_PRELOAD
item.description: The Toshiba printers are vulnerable to a Local Privilege Escalation vulnerability. An attacker can remotely compromise any Toshiba printer. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27148 · 7.4 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation and Remote Code Execution using insecure PATH
item.description: The Toshiba printers are vulnerable to a Local Privilege Escalation vulnerability. An attacker can remotely compromise any Toshiba printer. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27147 · 7.4 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation and Remote Code Execution using snmpd
item.description: The Toshiba printers are vulnerable to a Local Privilege Escalation vulnerability. An attacker can remotely compromise any Toshiba printer. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27146 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Lack of privileges separation
item.description: The Toshiba printers do not implement privileges separation. As for the affected products/models/versions, see the reference URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-27145 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Multiple Post-authenticated Remote Code Execution
item.description: The Toshiba printers provide several ways to upload files using the admin web interface. An attacker can remotely compromise any Toshiba printer. An attacker can overwrite any insecure files. This vulnerability can be executed in combination with oth…

item.title: CVE-2024-27144 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Pre-authenticated Remote Code Execution
item.description: The Toshiba printers provide several ways to upload files using the web interface without authentication. An attacker can overwrite any insecure files. And the Toshiba printers are vulnerable to a Local Privilege Escalation vulnerability. An attacker…

item.title: CVE-2024-27143 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Pre-authenticated Remote Code Execution
item.description: Toshiba printers use SNMP for configuration. Using the private community, it is possible to remotely execute commands as root on the remote printer. Using this vulnerability will allow any attacker to get a root access on a remote Toshiba printer. Th…

item.title: CVE-2024-27142 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Pre-authenticated XXE injection
item.description: Toshiba printers use XML communication for the API endpoint provided by the printer. For the endpoint, XML parsing library is used and it is vulnerable to a time-based blind XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability. An attacker can DoS the printers. A…

item.title: CVE-2024-27141 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Pre-authenticated Time-Based Blind XXE injection
item.description: Toshiba printers use XML communication for the API endpoint provided by the printer. For the endpoint, XML parsing library is used and it is vulnerable to a time-based blind XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability. An attacker can DoS the printers by…
